feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Build Automation booster does not show in trial account
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I cannot see the booster option for SAP Build process automation on my SAP trial account. Any reason why this is? I have enabled admin access to the Global account.

Regards,

Ishan

entry.title: CAP Application for Business Process Automation approval form?
entry.content:
I saw the following blog to 'Create an SAP UI5 Task for a Business Process'

Create an SAP UI5 Task for a Business Process | SAP Tutorials

My question is, is this only option for replacing the standatd BPA Approval form with a UI5 app, or is this also possible with CAP/Fiori elements?

If so, how?

entry.title: Problem using Action for APIs - SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to use Actions on an Automation to execute an API that was Build From Scratch. The API itself works, but I couldn't use the result on any other step. There is an Error "The parameter 'value' refers to an object that doesn't exist. Please click the parameter to change it".

It doesn't work with a data type either.

The API has the output mapped: 

 

Is there any solution or anything I'm not taking into account?

entry.title: SAP BTP Build Toggle one Item on screen does not work and Workflow activation
entry.content:
Hi To all,

Im following  @XavierPicquart  blogs where CALM Requirements from one selected CALM Project  should be selected/approved in the SAP Build/Process Automation .

In the first screen (project selection)  Im selecting a project from where I will get list of project Requirements . and this works ok. 

In the second "Requirements Selection " screen (see below) I got list of Project  Requirements listed  and then by toggling one requirement I should start process of approval which will happen in the SAP Business Process Automation.

I have 2 Problems:

  1. In requirements Screen I was not able to select only one Requirements , toggling one Req. all Req. will become  active as well. Not possible to toggle only one!? 
  2. After selecting proper Requirements, approval  Workflow should be started but nothing is happening ?

 

Example

Please advise what to do and where to look.

 

Thank you 

BM

entry.title: SAP_IPA_28014: The requested Document Information Extraction service operation could not be complete
entry.content:
Hello. 

Can you please help with this error that occurs in SAP build process automation? 

I'm trying to add a document template to my project in build process automation, however, without success because of the error. 

I've already assigned collections.

And subscribed for Document Information Extraction Trial

entry.title: Why I need a API KEY to start a Workflow Instance in Shared Enviroment ?
entry.content:
Hi, I have two enviroment in my actual SBPA. 

One for DEV (Public) and other for QAS (Shared).

 

When I start a Process in Public environment, with an API call. Does Not necessary inform an API KEY.

And the process is created.

When I try to created the same Process, but in the shared enviroment. Occurs an error: "

ApiKey property (irpa-api-key) was not found in request header or body."

 

If I send an API KEY, with the same call in the Shared enviroment. No error occurs and the process was created.

 

Is this obligatory for Shared environments, always i need to inform an API Key to create a Process?

 

Thanks for your help !

entry.title: Set Microsoft Information Protection (MIP) sensitivity value?
entry.content:
My company has a requirement that all new MS Office documents (Word, Excel, etc.) be assigned a "sensitivity" label when the file is saved. Based on the sensitivity value selected, the document may be encrypted and only accessible to others inside the company.

When creating a new Microsoft Excel file from SAP Build Process Automation, the "save" step is stalling because it is waiting for a MIP sensitivity value to be chosen.

Has anyone else experienced this problem and/or know of any workarounds to programmatically set the MIP value from SBPA? Microsoft does provide a MIP SDK, but I'm not sure if it's possible to import that into my project to reference the available methods.

entry.title: Maximum number of concurrent unattended execution reached error : unable to run automation.
entry.content:
Maximum number of concurrent unattended execution reached error.

we tried by disabling the one desktop agent against two , even though we are facing the same error , on individual level we can able to run automation separately but after deployment we can't able to run the automation.

since we have unlimited quota available in SAP BPA.

error message in automation jobs.

entry.title: Executing desktop automation for multiple users
entry.content:
Hi,

Customer wants to deploy some standard automations - eg: 4FP (Post goods movement) for S/4Hana Cloud. This automation expects data to be maintained in excel sheet on the user's system and a trigger scheduled along with desktop agent configured to pick and execute the automation. The file location and communication user/password for S4HC are entered while deploying the project,

For such automations, if there are multiple users who would want to use this automation, what is the technical approach to be given to users?

1. We cannot have a common trigger to execute for multiple users. So, should each user have a project deployed on his/her name and a trigger per project?

2. I don't think it's possible, but can we have multiple versions of the same project and for each version,  a trigger?

3. Can these automations read a file from shared folder/drive/sharepoint or does it mean, we need to customize the automation?

entry.title: SAP Joule
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am currently supporting a client from the German SME sector who is using the SAP ERP system SAP ECC (Enterprise Core Component) and is planning a transition to the SAP Cloud. It is still unclear whether this will be implemented as an on-premise or private cloud solution. My role involves developing an AI strategy for the After-Sales and IT departments, with the goal (for the IT department) to improve data interaction and processes within the ERP system and therefore across all departments.

I have heard about SAP Joule and would like to understand how this system could integrate into my client’s existing structure. Additionally, I am interested in how advanced the solution currently is, the requirements for data preparation, and how Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is supported. Currently, data maintenance is not in a format suitable for AI applications, which is a key factor in our planning.

Thank you in advance for any guidance you can provide!

entry.title: How to Make a Field Visible Only When a Specific Option is Selected in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on a form in SAP Build Process Automation and need help with conditional field visibility. I have a selection field called "Escolha um Veículo" (Choose a Vehicle) with three options: "Carro" (Car), "Moto" (Motorcycle), and "Outro" (Other).

Below this field, I have another field called "Outro Veículo" (Other Vehicle), which should only appear if the user selects the "Outro" option.

I would like to know how to make the "Outro Veículo" text field visible only when the "Outro" option is selected, and hidden otherwise.

Could you please guide me on how to achieve this using SAP Build Process Automation scripting or rules?

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation: Writing formatted text to a file.
entry.content:
I'm investigation ways of presenting formatted information from the results of say an LLM call.

I've looked into the Word SDK and this has an Insert text (Word) action. However, this has a single input of text which won't show for example html formatting in the word document.

The best we can do is open a pre-existing word document as a 'tempate' which has a formatted header, we set our output string to the body of the document which will have a format of whatever is specified in the template doc (Heading 3 in this case).

This is OK, but  it would be much better if we had a mechanism for passing in formatted text. That way we could have a document with headings in bold, different colours, and whatever styling we choose, making for a more professional-looking report. At the moment we can have line breaks and that's about it.

 

Are there any alternative to the Word SDK? I've also looked into the Microsoft office 365 Cloud SDK which handles SharePoint files but a) that doesn't seem to have a write formatted text action either and b) we are awaiting Azure access to get this setup.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Subcription Failed
entry.content:
Hi,

When i try to create SAP Build Process Automation for trails account, subscription failed. can someone please help on this. 

thanks. Satya

entry.title: How to assign Users as Approver and Requester in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am now creating Approval Form using SAP Build Process Automation.

1. And I am confusing how can I assign users as Approver and Requester Roles.

2. And how can I give administrator role to user also?

Could you please give me advice about these questions?

And if you have any related documentation, cloud you please share with me?

 

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: How to get Variant Management tile in Build Work Zone?
entry.content:
The documentation for Create a Process Variant, states 

Prerequisites

  • Variant Management is a tile in your site created with SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition.

  • You have access to the variant management editor.

How can I get Variant Management tile? I don't find this listed in "Content Manager / Content Explorer / HTML5 Apps". 

I am guessing that "variant management editor" is the application that is opened by this tile. What is the role required to have access to this application?

entry.title: Using the capture screen in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Using the capture screen in SAP Build Process Automation start for google.com, start a search, specify images, and then take the first 10 images and save them as JPGs in the local file system.

can you help me to achieve it.

@Dan_Wroblewski 
SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Form not shown in MyInbox Workzone standard
entry.content: In my workzone standard portal the My Inbox does show the tasks. But when I click on the task the form is not shown to approve or descline a task (see first screenshot). The inbox is working directly in the SAP BTP cockpit (second screenshot) so it seems a kind of authorization problem.

entry.title: How can auto-approval of a form be achieved in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a workflow requirement where the initial form fields (Form 1) should be non-editable. Once the form reaches 3 months from the created date, it should move to the next step (Form 2), where all the fields should become editable. I tried updating the task to "Completed" using Postman, but I am encountering the following error. Is there anyway to achieve form auto approval after 3 months? Kindly help us to over come this issue. 

Thanks,

Narenthiran Annamalai.

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Workflow Management, process visibility capability #Auto Approval Form

entry.title: Data Integration in Form BPA- Destination/s Creation in BTP
entry.content:
Novice, learning 1st steps to BPA and its integration.

I am trying to understand what is the best way to create a single destination in BTP (for S4 On-Premise) to consume Odata service say for Cost Centres and Materials to further use returned results integrated in Forms of BPA.

See attached snapshots, I have created multiple (2 destinations) in BTP, one for Cost Centre and another for Materials, but sure I think it should be possible to parameterise specific API against field/s in Forms of BPA while referring the Data Source or somewhere else in BPA, or creating multiple destinations is the only way? My API's/fetch work and gets data from S4 but its a pain to manage multiple destination albeit creation is one time activity.

Destinations in BTP:

Data Source in BPA Form

Thanks

SK

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: MODELO DE AUTORIZACIÓN DOCUMENTO VENCIDO
entry.content:
Buenas tardes para todos he intentado realizar un query para un modelo de autorización el cual cada vez que un cliente tenga una factura vencida se active el modelo de autorización para que sea aprobado.

Actualmente cuento con el siguiente Query pero no me aparece la ventana para enviar al aprobador "Por favor pueden ayudarme a validar que me hace falta para que funcione correctamente ? 

SELECT DISTINCT
'TRUE'
FROM
OCRD T1
INNER JOIN
OINV T2 ON T1."CardCode" = T2."CardCode"
WHERE
T1."CardCode" = $[ORDR.CardCode]
AND T2."DocStatus" = 'O'
AND T2."DocDueDate" < GETDATE()



 

Muchas gracias quedare muy atento.
